calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Goldee Seidman is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lanjun Guo, Douglas Deng, Johnny Guo aka Jonathan Deng are present.
Attorney Alexander Merchant appearing for all three defendants.

The Judge Pro Tem Deb Schweizer, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of November 12, 2013 is vacated.
